report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#425-429) and newsletter v38 covering March jobs Good Friday drop (+57K), BTC $68.5K Iran relief rally, Drift Day 4 fund laundering ($230M+ bridged to ETH), CLARITY Act Senate countdown (returns April 13), and weekend macro roundup. Created 2 social card SVGs (Jobs Report Good Friday, Drift Fund Laundering). Content calendar extends through Nov 15 across v38 cycle.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #425: March Jobs Report Good Friday Drop — +57K nonfarm payrolls released while markets closed, effectively flat after Kaiser strike bounce, Monday open will be violent, BTC front-ran to $68.5K (Sun Nov 9, 2PM ET)
Tweet #426: BTC Relief Rally Iran Peace Catalyst — $66.5K → $68.5K (+3%), Pezeshkian signals end to war, Trump says 'within weeks', relief rally ≠ trend reversal (Tue Nov 11, 3PM ET)
Tweet #427: Drift Day 4 Fund Laundering — 3-tweet thread: $230M+ bridged SOL→ETH via CCTP, DPRK 18th theft of 2026, governance not code attack, 'audit admin keys not just code' (Thu Nov 13, 1PM ET)
Tweet #428: CLARITY Act Senate Countdown — returns April 13, markup late April, May floor vote or bill dies, DeFi treatment + yield ban unresolved (Fri Nov 14, 1PM ET)
Tweet #429: Weekend Macro + Market Roundup — jobs, BTC rally, F&G, stablecoins, Drift, Senate, Fed (Sat Nov 15, 11AM ET)
Newsletter v38: 'The Data Dropped. The Markets Were Closed.' — Good Friday jobs + Iran catalyst + Drift laundering + CLARITY countdown + Stablecoin Yield Tracker launch
Discord/Telegram: Macro Update + Security Follow-Up (Mon Nov 10, 5PM ET)
Total tweets all-time: 429 (5 new this cycle), content scheduled Nov 9-15

metrics.label: CLARITY Act Guide
metrics.value: Senate returns Apr 13, markup late April

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: MARCH JOBS REPORT — GOOD FRIDAY DROP: +57K nonfarm payrolls released April 3 while every US stock exchange was closed. Unemployment steady at 4.4%. February's -92K revised context: Kaiser strike resolution adds ~30K back. 5th negative/flat month in 9. Monday's open will be violent — recession-confirming or rally-sparking data digested over 3-day weekend. DCA Calculator peak relevance.

BTC RELIEF RALLY — IRAN PEACE CATALYST: Bitcoin bounced from $66.5K to $68.5K (+3%) on Reuters report that Iranian President Pezeshkian signaled willingness to end the war. First green day in a week. F&G still 8-12, BTC still -47% from ATH. Relief rally ≠ trend reversal.

DRIFT EXPLOIT DAY 4 — FUND LAUNDERING: $230M+ USDC bridged from Solana to Ethereum via Circle CCTP. Converted to ETH, portions through CEXs. DPRK attribution strengthened — 18th state-sponsored crypto theft of 2026. CoinDesk: 'Audit admin keys, not just code.' Paradigm shift from code audits to governance audits. Smart Contract Auditing Guide elevated.

CLARITY ACT — SENATE COUNTDOWN 10 DAYS: Senate returns April 13. Banking Committee markup late April. May floor vote deadline. Key unresolved: DeFi treatment, stablecoin yield ban (Section 404), ethics rules, state vs federal licensing. If misses May vote, dies at midterms.

CONTENT AUTHORITY AT 76 GUIDES: Internal linking clusters deepening. Stablecoin Yield Tracker launched into perfect timing. 426 pages on disk, ~399 published slugs. Deploy debt at 13th escalation — 40 uncommitted files blocking SEO value.
